articles.title: I use the 'Gravity' prompt with ChatGPT every day — here’s how it finds and fixes weak ideas
tldr: • 	Problem: Usual “improve this” prompts make weak ideas feel smarter by polishing language instead of exposing core flaws.
• 	Solution: The “Gravity” prompt makes ChatGPT act as a hostile critic—poking holes, surfacing blind spots, and stress‑testing assumptions.
• 	Result: It drags ideas through reality, separating what merely sounds good from what actually holds up, anytime you need it.

articles.title: New Superpowers Plugin Guides Claude Code AI : Brainstorm, Planning & Executing a Tested Builds
tldr: - The Superpowers plugin gives Claude Code a structured workflow centered on planning, TDD, and precision.
- It uses parallel sub‑agents to speed execution and reduce developer effort.
- Automated Git commits and Red‑Green testing maintain clean history and reliable code.

articles.title: Experiments Find LLMs Rely on Training Data & Lose Mid-Document Details
tldr: - LLMs often favor training data over new input, missing novel terms and producing inaccurate analysis when data is unique or unfamiliar.
- They suffer context decay in long documents, reliably recalling beginnings and endings but losing critical details buried in the middle.
- Even with RAG, AI can miss nuances or retrieve poorly, creating risks in high‑stakes tasks like legal, medical, or financial analysis

articles.title: I use this simple repetition trick with ChatGPT when it misses the point — and it works every time
tldr: - Repeating the exact same prompt makes models refine their reasoning, shifting from quick guesses to clearer, more accurate interpretations.
- Second and third attempts consistently improve structure, precision, and relevance, a behavior confirmed by research on “internal inference” stabilization.
- This simple repetition trick reliably upgrades troubleshooting, comparisons, and detailed explanations without any special prompt engineering.

articles.title: The visibility mirage: Why AI pilots keep stalling between ambition and impact
tldr: - AI pilots stall due to integration complexity, system sprawl, and late governance, which slow progress once work moves beyond early prototypes.
- Leaders see milestones while practitioners face daily friction, creating a visibility gap that hides execution issues until they escalate.
- Success requires early ownership, integration planning, shared visibility, and funding so pilots can scale into reliable production systems.

articles.title: AI models that simulate internal debate dramatically improve accuracy on complex tasks
tldr: - Google’s study shows top reasoning models improve accuracy by simulating internal debates among diverse “personas,” a process they call society of thought.
- These autonomous multi‑voice checks—verification, dissent, backtracking—boost performance more than long monologues or sanitized training data.
- Enterprises can enhance reasoning by prompting conflicting roles, using debate‑rich training data, and exposing internal dissent for trust and auditing.

articles.title: How to Build a Self-Organizing Agent Memory System for Long-Term AI Reasoning
tldr: - The tutorial builds a self‑organizing agent memory system that converts interactions into structured knowledge units, separating reasoning from memory extraction, compression, and organization.
- Using SQLite, scenes, summaries, and symbolic retrieval, the system maintains long‑term context without relying solely on opaque vector search.
- A memory manager and worker agent collaborate so the agent recalls relevant scenes, updates memory, and supports stable long‑horizon reasoning.

articles.title: WTF is Markdown for AI agents?
tldr: - AI agents prefer markdown over HTML because it removes layout noise, reduces token cost, and delivers clean, structured content that models can parse efficiently.
- Cloudflare and others now auto‑convert HTML to markdown so agents can access text‑only versions, improving accuracy, reducing hallucinations, and lowering compute waste for AI crawlers.
- Markdown (and LLM.txt) helps brands ensure clearer facts in AI answers, though direct financial benefit for publishers remains uncertain

articles.title: I use the FORGE method with Claude to turn rough ideas into finished work — here's how it works
tldr: - A five‑step method (Frame, Obstruct, Reconstruct, Generate, Edit) turns AI into a thinking partner, forcing clarity, criticism, and structured reasoning before drafting.
- You stay in control while AI handles questions, weaknesses, and structure, producing stronger, more authentic work in ~40 minutes.
- Sequential prompting deepens your thinking, improves arguments, and builds irreplaceable collaboration skills for writing and communication.

articles.title: From Grammar Checker to AI Productivity Platform - SoftwarePlaza
tldr: **Grammarly transforms from a grammar checker into an AI productivity platform.**
It is redefining enterprise communication through advanced AI capabilities.
This evolution positions Grammarly as a key tool for enhancing organizational writing efficiency.

articles.title: Zoom expands agentic AI platform to automate workflows across ...
tldr: **Zoom expands its agentic AI platform to automate workflows across collaboration and customer experience products.**
New capabilities include custom AI agents, workflow orchestration, and AI Companion expansion across Zoom products.
Organizations can automate tasks and trigger workflows from interactions, potentially assisting with project follow-ups.

articles.title: Morgen vs Motion: AI Daily Planner Comparison
tldr: Morgen and Motion are AI-powered daily planners designed to automatically generate schedules in your calendar.
Morgen offers features like AI planning, task management, calendar automation, and team workflows.
These tools aim to optimize individual and team daily schedules by integrating tasks and calendar events.

articles.title: This AI Tool Builds Polished Presentations in Seconds
tldr: **PowerPresent AI is an AI tool designed to create polished presentations rapidly.**
The article promotes a lifetime subscription offer for PowerPresent AI, highlighting its efficiency.
It aims to streamline the creation of professional-looking slides for various business communication needs.

articles.title: Gumloop lands $50M from Benchmark to turn every employee into an AI agent builder
tldr: Gumloop raised $50M from Benchmark to enable every employee to build AI agents.
The company aims to democratize AI agent creation, making it accessible across the enterprise.
This approach could foster widespread automation and custom AI solution development within organizations.

articles.title: Atlassian to cut 10pc of its workforce and embrace AI
tldr: **Atlassian is cutting 10% of its workforce as it strategically shifts to embrace AI technologies.**
This move by a major software vendor signals a broader industry trend towards AI integration and automation.
The focus on AI will likely influence future enhancements in Atlassian's project management and collaboration tools.

articles.title: How ServiceNow AI Agents Are Transforming Enterprise Workflows
tldr: **ServiceNow AI agents are transforming enterprise workflows by autonomously participating in and completing meaningful work.**
The platform combines AI, workflow automation, enterprise data, and governance, with an Orchestrator coordinating agents.
Agents manage complex processes across IT, HR, finance, and operations, relevant to cross-functional project coordination.
